violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Observed a dry hand sink at the beginning of the inspection. Had a conversation with employees about the importance of proper hand washing.
Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Sanitizing solution at proper concentration of 100 ppm chlorine not 200 ppm +.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Site must use WASH, RINSE, SANITIZE in the 3 comp sink. Chlorine at 50 ppm is the proper concentration. In use utensils wash, rinse, sanitize every 4 hours.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
